info.description:
# GET Endpoints

Source: [https://foshcatering.ungerboeck.net/test/swagger/docs/V1](https://foshcatering.ungerboeck.net/test/swagger/docs/V1)

## ~~AccountAffiliations~~ (2)

- GET /api/v1/AccountAffiliations/{OrgCode}
    
    - summary: Basic - Search for account affiliations using OData.
        
    - requiredPath: OrgCode:string
        
    - requiredQuery: search:string
        
    - responseCodes: 200
        
- GET /api/v1/AccountAffiliations/{OrgCode}/{AccountCode}/{AffiliationCode}
    
    - summary: Basic - Get a single affiliation on an account by its parameters
        
    - requiredPath: OrgCode:string, AccountCode:string, AffiliationCode:string
        
    - responseCodes: 200
